scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../ml-service && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../blockchain && npm install
scripts.blockchain:deploy: cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run blockchain" "npm run ml-service" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
